response:
# Basic Everyday Salad Ingredients
## Core Base Greens
- [ ] 4 cups chopped fresh leafy greens (mixed spring greens, baby spinach, or romaine lettuce)
## Simple Add-Ins
- [ ] ½ cup halved cherry tomatoes
- [ ] ½ cup sliced fresh cucumber
- [ ] ¼ cup thinly sliced red onion (optional, soak in cold water first to muffle sharp flavor)
## Classic Basic Toppings
- [ ] 2 tbsp toasted seeds (pumpkin, sunflower, or sesame seeds)
- [ ] ¼ cup crumbled feta cheese (or shredded parmesan, optional)
- [ ] ¼ cup chopped fresh herbs (basil, flat-leaf parsley, or dill)
## Basic Vinaigrette Dressing
- [ ] 2 tbsp extra-virgin olive oil
- [ ] 1 tbsp balsamic vinegar (or red wine vinegar)
- [ ] ¼ tsp sea salt (plus more to taste)
- [ ] Freshly ground black pepper (to taste)
- [ ] 1 tsp Dijon mustard (optional, for added creaminess and tang)
- [ ] 1 tsp raw honey (optional, for a subtle sweet balance)
